user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all asset requisitions with requisition number, date, requested asset, requester, department, requested and issued quantities and status, so that I can track outstanding asset requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Asset Requisition List screen; When the list loads; Then requisitions are shown with number, date, requested asset, requested by, department, requested quantity, issued quantity and status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter requisitions by status such as Pending with me, Pending Approval, Pending for Issuance, Pending for Partial Issuance, Rejected, Withdrawn or Issued / Acknowledged, so that I can act on requisitions in a specific state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Asset Requisition List screen; When I select a status and search; Then only requisitions with that status are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter requisitions by period and department, so that I can narrow requests to a timeframe and team
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Asset Requisition List screen; When I set a period range and select a department and search; Then only matching requisitions are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign an asset requisition, so that I can allocate requested assets to the requesting employee
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Asset Requisition List screen; When I click Assign asset requisition; Then I can assign the requisition to fulfil the asset request

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the requisition filters, so that I can clear my selection and view all requisitions
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period, status or department filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters clear and the full requisition list is restored
